headlines.headline: Knicks warn of stepped-up security for fans amid Trump's G3 attendance
headlines.description: The New York Knicks are warning fans to bring as little as possible to Game 3 of the NBA Finals and encouraging them to arrive at least two hours before tipoff as part of enhanced security measures with President Donald Trump attending the game.

headlines.headline: Taylor Swift's courtside Cavs ECF seat goes up for bidding

headlines.headline: Deflated Carolina Hurricanes face 2-1 deficit after 2OT loss
headlines.description: After allowing four goals in the second period, and rallying to tie Game 3 in the third, only to lose it in double overtime on a bad bounce Saturday, the deflated Carolina Hurricanes face a 2-1 deficit in the Stanley Cup Final with Game 4 set for Tuesday.
